name: SongCounter
description: Counts analyzed songs and shows them as a bar chart. A settings page (opened from the Manage Plugins Settings button) lets you choose which embeddings to count (Musicnn, DCLAP, GTE lyrics).
author: NeptuneHub

versions.changelog: Declare the plugin as Flask-only (targets) so worker containers skip its code and matplotlib dependency.
Draw the counts as a bar chart using matplotlib (installed via the plugin requirements).
Saving settings returns to the Manage Plugins page.
Add a settings page with embedding checkboxes and render pages inside the app layout so the navigation menu stays.
